info.title: dllspy
info.description: CLI tool that discovers input surfaces and security vulnerabilities in compiled .NET assemblies.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Discover input surfaces and security issues in .NET assemblies

options.name: --method
options.description: Filter HTTP endpoints by verb (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

options.name: --auth
options.description: Only show surfaces requiring authorization [default: False]

options.name: --anon
options.description: Only show surfaces allowing anonymous access [default: False]

options.name: --host-only
options.description: Only scan host (runnable) assemblies, skip class libraries [default: False]

options.name: --min-severity
options.description: Minimum severity for scan mode [default: Info]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format: table, tsv, json (default: table for TTY, tsv for piped)

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the .NET assembly to scan
